events.comment: Draw ground slots (5 rows x 9 columns)

parameters: "GroundSlot clicked: index=" + ToString(GroundSlot.Variable(SlotIndex)) + ", row=" + ToString(GroundSlot.Variable(SlotRow)) + ", column=" + ToString(GroundSlot.Variable(SlotColumn)) + ", occupied=true"

eventsFunctionsExtensions.name: PlantCards
eventsFunctionsExtensions.shortDescription: Reusable plant card UI and placement logic.
eventsFunctionsExtensions.description: Handles plant card affordability, click-to-preview, placement, cost deduction, and cooldown mask updates for PvZ-style cards.

eventsBasedObjects.description: Reusable PvZ-style plant card UI. Owns the card sprite, cooldown mask, and mouse preview sprite internally.
eventsBasedObjects.name: PlantCardSlot

sprites.image: assets/sunflowerCard.png
assets/SunFlowerG.png
assets/SunFlowerSlotCooldownMask.png
assets/SunFlower.png

eventsFunctions.description: Handle a reusable plant card slot with internal Card, CooldownMask, and MousePreview UI: affordability, cost deduction, cooldown, preview following, and placement request output.
eventsFunctions.name: Handle
eventsFunctions.sentence: Handle _PARAM0_ with slots _PARAM1_, sun counter _PARAM2_, sun value _PARAM3_, cooldown _PARAM4_, placement _PARAM5_ at _PARAM6_;_PARAM7_

parameters.description: Grid slot object used for placement.
parameters.name: GroundSlot

parameters.description: Scene variable set true for one frame when placement is requested.
parameters.name: PlacementRequestedVariable

parameters.description: Scene variable receiving requested placement center X.
parameters.name: PlacementXVariable

parameters.description: Scene variable receiving requested placement center Y.
parameters.name: PlacementYVariable

propertyDescriptors.label: Card sprite image
propertyDescriptors.description: Image resource used by the active card sprite.
propertyDescriptors.name: CardSpriteImage

propertyDescriptors.label: Sun value
propertyDescriptors.description: Sun cost paid when the card is used.
propertyDescriptors.name: SunValue

propertyDescriptors.label: Mask sprite image
propertyDescriptors.description: Image resource used by the cooldown mask sprite.
propertyDescriptors.name: MaskSpriteImage

propertyDescriptors.label: Mouse preview sprite image
propertyDescriptors.description: Image resource used by the internal mouse-following preview sprite.
propertyDescriptors.name: MousePreviewSpriteImage

propertyDescriptors.label: Initialized
propertyDescriptors.description: Internal runtime flag for slot initialization.
propertyDescriptors.name: PlantCardInitialized

propertyDescriptors.label: Cooling down
propertyDescriptors.description: Internal runtime flag for slot cooldown.
propertyDescriptors.name: PlantCardCoolingDown

propertyDescriptors.label: Cooldown timer
propertyDescriptors.description: Internal elapsed cooldown time in seconds.
propertyDescriptors.name: PlantCardCooldownTimer

propertyDescriptors.label: Holding preview
propertyDescriptors.description: Internal runtime flag for an unplaced plant preview.
propertyDescriptors.name: PlantCardHolding

propertyDescriptors.label: Ready to place
propertyDescriptors.description: Internal runtime flag allowing placement after release.
propertyDescriptors.name: PlantCardReady
